display.name: Coral Garden
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A living reef of coral polyps gently swaying in current, deep ocean color, slow camera at the seafloor.

annotation.technical_notes: A dense, undulating landscape of coral-like structures is generated using custom shapes and waves replicated through frame feedback. A low decay rate in sampler_main allows these colorful floral clusters to persist and accumulate into a continuous 3D terrain. The camera's sweeping flight path and the terrain's rippling motion are driven by per-pixel warp equations modulated by the music's bass and mid-frequency bands.
